item.title: My Zatanna Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here— sharing a picture from one of my latest photoshoots! I brought back an old favorite of mine: Zatanna from DC Comics. I actually edited this whole thing myself too, which I’m really proud of. Trying to get better with photoshop!
The edit was inspired by this picture, it’s a variant cover of Zatanna # 16 by Ariel Diaz. Unfortunately the pose isn’t exactly right, as I didn’t have this cover in mind when I took the photo, but I think it worked well for the edit regardless!
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: I am DONE with organic chemistry!
item.description: I don't really have anyone to tell in person, so. I passed organic chemistry with a 95.82 in the class. I can't believe this actually happened. It was an entirely online, accelerated 7.5 week semester, and I just finished my final with a 93.33 on it, and it's just blowing my mind that I did so well. I have been dreading this class for literal years, and now it is over AND I just found out that the school I'm transferring to kind of combines their Orgo and Gen Chem classes for their marine science degree and since I have now taken three chemistry classes, I am DONE for my undergrad degree. I feel like I can finally breathe again. MV Edit: Thank you everyone! You're the best. If you wanna check it out, I posted my absolutely failed version of NileRed's experiment where he turned cotton balls into cotton candy. I did the experiment for my honors program and completely messed it up, but it was fun to do. https://imgur.com/gallery/cwYsmPv
item.dc:creator: SharkDoctor

item.title: The dump. The dump of reposts, the dump chosen especially to post reposts, reposts' dump. That dump?
item.description:
I saved this to show an uncle who loved his old Bronco. Its so pretty
He's right, you know.
Yep. My desk tasks would dissolve into chaos
For my teacher humans. They deal with far too many small humans, so that the rest of us hopefully have less fuckwits to deal with when those smalls start growing up
I read a dragonage fanfic once where a rage demon entered the world as a goose. It was glorious. It killed the occasional handsy nobleman
The middle blender now has an Oscar for Best Actor #spoilers
This. I liked this.
Shocking how many times I've explained how to attach a file to an email
Pms also does this to the Uterus Havers
Also me at my husband. And my husband at me. Both must provide coffee in exchange for the little songs
"Happiness in your household" tonal emphasis will get ya ever time
And the second time. And the ninth time.
I do as the Flame guides
Goddamn it
I love and hate that this checks out
Don't support munchkin kitties y'all, that's how we got horribly unwell small dogs
My security admin loved this
Babe wake up, new love language just dropped
The cold refreshing beverage. It sings to me, ricky
Whats that one country song where it turns out he's singing about his grandma?
It's almost spring. give me the plant.
Baby kitty
Hah
This. This is real. This happens to me all the damn time
YUP. I don't know why such a high percentage of IT professionals are furries, and at this point I'm afraid to ask
dO yOU HaVE anY iDEA HOW EXPENSIVE THOSE ARE. STOP IT.
I can name five women like this off the top of my head. Makes me sad.
cute
Sent this to my one friend who self identifies as Basic White Bitch. She confirmed twas the season
This. I love this. I do this. I regret in the morning
Potato luck
UGH more punative damage
My uncle's name is Fleep
The irish one, obviously
I...yes
I don't remember saving that one
Hah!
item.dc:creator: ecrouse

item.title: "Did You Know? The Bearded Vulture Loves Eating Bones!"
item.description: Bearded vultures have stomach acid with a pH level below one, which means it can dissolve skin, bone, teeth, and hooves. Large bones, like the ones in the video, take approximately 24 hours to dissolve completely.
item.dc:creator: TutsNest

item.title: 460lbs to 300 3ish years
item.description: Honestly wondering if I should do a yt series or something to share my story. No I don’t take peds and yes I have hypergonadism so in theory I have higher test then the average person, its 1100(ng/dl). I know this is slightly above average but it does make a difference. This is also for a Reddit post but just wanted to be transparent and needed to create a link. Thanks!
item.dc:creator: michaelspitler77

item.title: Wholesome Wednesday dump (mostly the Oscars and stuff)
item.description:
1. Charlize Theron excited to do tequila shots
2. Emma Stone finds out that Poor Things won the Oscar for Makeup & Hairstyling
3. They are evolving!
4. Goal: Actress Goal: Acchieved
5. Awww
6. Yet another film makers influenced by O.G. Star Wars
7
8
9. Ke Huy Quan's Oscar selfies
10. My opinion - you decide whether it's popular or not, but probably he should have returned in Indiana Jones instead of Mutt Williams and also Ryan Gosling should be there in too. Watch Blade Runner press conferences. Harrison and Ryan have amazing chemistry and of course Ke is great too. That would have been my ideal cast for a post-Crusaders Indiana Jones sequel. Also I don't care what anyone says Crusaders is the best Indiana Jones film of all time. It has it all - heart, action, nazi punching, Sean Connery, Salah, tank battle and John Williams score.
11
12. They made my day
13. Constructions workers make sure that this little library is still accessible
14
15. Don't forget! P.S. 1 Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. It would make my day if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. 2 HAVE A GREAT WEEK!

item.title: Memes for Days 12
item.dc:creator: bobbythecat

item.title: Words Can't Properly Describe My Surprise and Joy
item.description: In September 2018, the State of Missouri didn't like cannabis one bit. Especially if it was being delivered all the way from California! An arrest was made. Bail was made. But a life was forever-changed. This was was 4mo before it would become medicinally legal in the state, and 4yrs before being legalized for recreational use. In September 2020, 5 years probation began and a ”Suspension Imposition of Sentence” was set (lengthy laundry list of 'do this, pay that.' The case exists but is sealed and can't be used in court). In April 2023, per the state's rules, a request to end probation at half time (2.5yrs) is granted. No more probation, but the case is still visible on record even though it can't be used. 10yrs and $200 before it can be expunged from record. March 2024, record expunged! ... Turns out, back in 2022, in Article XIV, Section 2 of the MO constitution, virtually all cannabis-related cases were to be expunged, in light of the recreational legalization that occurred earlier in the year. They've processed over 100k cases, and apparently that's estimated to be only 10% of them. This is a chapter of my life that is now well and truly behind me. I'm gonna have a beer! Cheers to anyone who actually read this! I'm just so grateful! MV Edit: holy cow, thank you everyone for your kind words and support! If I could say one thing: if you know anyone who has court clerk experience and is in the MO area, they need all the damn help they can get getting these cases expunged, according to this article: https://missouriindependent.com/2024/01/17/missouri-courts-request-3-7-million-to-continue-arduous-marijuana-expungement-process/
item.dc:creator: doppelfisch
